query: Hades II Unseen Update June 2025 Umbral Flames rework combat changes patch notes

mako.raw:
{"query":"Hades II Unseen Update June 2025 Umbral Flames rework combat changes patch notes","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1943,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://hades2.wiki.fextralife.com/Patch+Notes","title":"All Patch Notes on Hades 2 Complete List | Hades 2 Wiki","content":"The developer updates released through official community channels frequently balance the strengths of Melinoe's gear and magical boons to keep combat feeling fair and fun.
Note: The vast majority of changes are to the Underworld route; the Surface route is mostly unchanged.
The v1.0 Launch of Hades II has finally arrived!
Fixed interaction between Howling Soul (Hades) and Anvil Ring (Hephaestus) or Arctic Ring (Demeter)
Argent Skull (Persephone): bonus Omega Special duration now charges from Olympian damage; reworked passive benefit now automatically raises Boon Lv.
Bridal Glow (Hera): reworked — upgrades a random Boon to Heroic Rarity and gives it bonus Pom Lv.
Frosty Veneer: reduced effectiveness (the minimum damage you can take is now increased)
Triple Comet (Flames): new!
Charon's Gold Rewards now include Nightmare after a certain point.
Reworked Gathering Tool upgrades; now let you find +1 Elemental Essence for your Infusion Boons.
Fixed interaction between Frosty Veneer (Demeter) and Engraved Pin (Moros)
Clarified when clear conditions for certain Fated List Prophecies are listed on more than one page.
Umbral Flames (Eos): reworked; Omega Attack now fires a slow shot that occasionally creates damage blasts and also copies your Specials.
Colossus Driver (Skull): also affects Omega Special.
Your Sprint is innately faster and turning is more responsive; re-scaled abilities that boost this.
The Swift Runner: now also makes your Dash immediate (note the faster speed means you are invulnerable for very slightly less time); re-scaled Sprint speed bonus since Sprint is innately faster now."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/articles/hades-2s-unseen-update-patch-10-will-likely-be-its-last-before-v10-launch-whenever-that-will-be","title":"Hades 2's Unseen Update Patch 10 Will 'Likely' Be Its Last Before v1.0 Launch, 'Whenever That Will Be' - IGN","content":"Hades 2's next patch could be its last before the game emerges from its early access cocoon.
The full patch notes are included below, although please note we've removed any notes including spoiler tags, so you'll have to head on over to Steam to read those.
Hades 2 Unseen Update Patch 10 patch notes:
Fixed an issue where Melinoë could suddenly take 500 damage using Eruption (Path of Stars) and Night Bloom (Selene) to raise a Tempus in the battle against Chronos...
Fixed Sea Star (Poseidon) sometimes doubling items created by Gold Gold Gold (Echo)
Fixed Past Deeds screen not showing more than 36 Boons if you had that many
Hades 2 is the sequel to Supergiant's hit game, mixing engaging storytelling and roguelite action elements for an engaging dungeon-crawling experience.
Featuring excellent refinements to its roguelite progression, a fantastic new main character in Melinoe, and two unique sets of levels that have you fighting foes on the surface and in the underworld.""}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Hades II Unseen Update June 2025 Umbral Flames rework combat changes patch notes","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://hades2.wiki.fextralife.com/Patch+Notes","title":"Patch Notes | Hades 2 Wiki","content":"Umbral Flames (Eos): reworked; Omega Attack now fires a slow shot that occasionally creates damage blasts and also copies your Specials.","score":0.7491794,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://hades.fandom.com/wiki/The_Unseen_Update","title":"The Unseen Update - Hades Wiki - Fandom","content":"Umbral Flames: The Flames of Ygnium now offer a smoother, snappier fighting style Godsent Hexes: The Path of Stars now can infuse each Selene","score":0.7101667,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/Hades2/comments/1ldsfpr/new_update_alert_the_unseen_update_patch_notes","title":"r/Hades2 - NEW UPDATE ALERT 🚨🚨🚨 The Unseen ...","content":"Umbral Flames: reworked — adjusted properties of Attacks and Specials for improved flow and feel","score":0.70580584,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://mobalytics.gg/hades-2/guides/launch-patch-notes","title":"Hades 2 Patch Notes: v1.0 Launch Edition","content":"The patch notes below are from the original version from SuperGiant! • New Keepsakes: several new Keepsakes are waiting to be discovered... • New Decorations: liven up the Crossroads with new unlockable decor. • New Artwork: new visual effects, environment art, and other visual improvements abound. • New Music: listen for a number of stirring new tracks. · Sister Blades: increased damage and range of Attack sequence. · Moonstone Axe: increased Special speed; now easier to Dash out of the Attack sequence. · Umbral Flames (Supay): reduced Omega Special Magick cost and damage; slightly reduced Omega Attack and Omega Special rate of fire. · Minor adjustments to requirements for Hidden Aspects to be revealed to Melinoë by various characters. 📢 The stasis effect from the Stopper Perk from the Vow of Fangs now is easier to anticipate.","score":0.6894943,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/articles/hades-2s-unseen-update-patch-10-will-likely-be-its-last-before-v10-launch-whenever-that-will-be","title":"Hades 2's Unseen Update Patch 10 Will 'Likely' Be Its Last ...","content":"Umbral Flames: reduced orbit speed of Omega Special projectiles, but increased their damage; Argent Skull: Omega Special wave projectiles no","score":0.643173,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.87,"request_id":"501efc9b-0b30-4353-bc06-9a34e8f95f6f"}
